Ex Parte Application For Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance Of Additional Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Jun-26-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Judy Lam, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: J.P. Morgan Securities, Inc.
Matthew J. Gluck, Atty. for Defendant and opposing party: Bruce A. Blockley

RULING:
AFTER HEARING, THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff J.P. Morgan Securities Inc.'s Application For An Additional Writ Of Attachment is DENIED. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED. (EAH/612)

Ntc Of Application And Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Jun-04-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Judy Man-Ling Lam, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: J.P. Morgan Securities
Robert Charles Friese, Atty. for Defendant and opposing party: Bruce A. Blockley

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff J.P. Morgan Securities, Inc.'s Application For Writ Of Attachment is granted in the amount of $2,284,029. The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000. The objections to the declaration of David Knepper are overruled. Tentative adopted, striking item 11 in the Exhibit A to the order. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. Reporter: Sheila Arceno, CSR #13293

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2009 Set For Trial On Dec-07-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Nov-20-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 604
